violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. - Minor areas of repair needed to shelving/cabinets.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was reused or used more than one time. - Store boxes of single service items off floor in storage room.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors need cleaning under equipment, throughout kitchen, and along wall junctures.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. - Several ceiling tiles in dishwashing room in need of repair.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
